Fixed: null and undefined values no longer incorrectly pass equals, contains, starts-with, ends-with, and regex operators — they now consistently fail
Numeric comparison operators (greater-than, less-than, greater-equal, less-equal) no longer return incorrect results when either value is non-numeric — NaN inputs now always fail
Response body is now parsed from JSON string before field access, fixing body.* assertions on JSON responses
Removed catch-all shim block that caused runtime bundle errors
Register assertions help entry in the command palette

title: Initial Release
description: Simple response assertions for Voiden REST API testing.

Added: Visual pass/fail indicators in the response panel
